parsed.recommendation_text: For office work, the Sony WH-1000XM5 excels with its industry-leading noise cancellation and comfortable build. It offers excellent sound quality for wireless headphones and supports multiple codecs like LDAC. Though it's non-foldable and has an average call microphone, its premium features make it ideal for a high-quality office experience.
parsed.selection_rationale: Best noise cancellation and comfort; Sony brand familiarity is high.
